    void
    Config.AddValidationEntry(String key, Object value)
    Deprecated.
    Use Config.addValidationEntry(String, Object).
    void
    Config.AddValidationEntry(String key, Object value, String comment)
    Deprecated.
    Use Config.addValidationEntry(String, Object, String).

    Deprecated.
